customer_message: Hi, my order was supposed to arrive three days ago, but I still have not received it. Can you please check the status?
good_output_note: Should apologize, acknowledge delay, and offer help checking the order.

customer_message: I received the wrong item in my package. I ordered a blue medium sweater, but I got a black small one.
good_output_note: Should apologize and provide replacement or return instructions.

customer_message: Your service is terrible. Nobody has helped me.
good_output_note: Should remain calm and professional and acknowledge frustration.

customer_message: I want a full refund and compensation for the stress caused.
good_output_note: Should not promise compensation and should suggest escalation.

customer_message: My package arrived damaged. What can you do?
good_output_note: Should apologize and offer return or replacement options.
